events.label: assistant
events.text: I’m checking the OSHA permit sequence point, then I’ll write the required JSON file directly at `/app/answer.json`.

events.label: shell (exit 127)
events.text:
/bin/sh -lc "cat > /app/answer.json <<'EOF'
{
  \"decision\": \"fail\",
  \"risk\": \"high\",
  \"work_stage\": \"in-progress\",
  \"component_conditions\": [\"non-compliant\"],
  \"percent_complete\": 50,
  \"value\": 0,
  \"sound_source\": \"\",
  \"confidence\": 0.94,
  \"event_time\": 0.0,
  \"rate\": 0.0,
  \"order\": [
    \"stop-work\",
    \"evacuate-authorized-entrants\",
    \"entry-supervisor-terminate-entry-and-cancel-expired-permit\",
    \"reassess-space-hazards-and-entry-conditions\",
    \"verify-isolation-ventilation-atmospheric-testing-communications-and-rescue-controls\",
    \"issue-new-current-entry-permit-signed-by-entry-supervisor\",
    \"resume-entry-only-after-permit-is-posted-or-available-to-entrants\"
  ],
  \"workable\": [],
  \"findings\": [
    \"Confined-space entry continued after the authorized permit duration expired.\",
    \"Expired permit means the entry is no longer authorized and the active work sequence is non-compliant.\",
    \"Entrants may be exposed without current verification of acceptable entry conditions and required controls.\"
  ],
  \"actions\": [
    \"Stop confined-space work immediately.\",
    \"Have authorized entrants exit the space and maintain attendant control of the entry point.\",
    \"Entry supervisor must terminate entry and cancel the expired permit.\",
    \"Reevaluate hazards, atmospheric test results, isolation, ventilation, communication, PPE, attendants, and rescue arrangements.\",
    \"Prepare, sign, and post or otherwise make available a new valid entry permit before any re-entry or continuation of work.\"
  ],
  \"rationale\": \"A permit-required confined-space entry may proceed only under a current entry permit with an authorized duration. Once the permit expired mid-shift, continuing work was out of sequence: entry must stop, the expired permit must be canceled, conditions and controls must be reverified, and a new entry supervisor-signed permit must be issued before work continues.\",
  \"references\": [
    \"OSHA 29 CFR 1910.146(e)(1)\",
    \"OSHA 29 CFR 1910.146(e)(2)\",
    \"OSHA 29 CFR 1910.146(e)(3)\",
    \"OSHA 29 CFR 1910.146(e)(4)\",
    \"OSHA 29 CFR 1910.146(e)(5)\",
    \"OSHA 29 CFR 1910.146(f)(3)\",
    \"OSHA 29 CFR 1910.146(f)(10)\"
  ]
}
EOF
jq . /app/answer.json"
→ /bin/sh: 47: jq: not found

events.label: assistant
events.text: `jq` is not installed in this container, so I’m validating the JSON with Node instead.
